'''''Soryi''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]] campaign. During [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] campaign to expand Imperial presence in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]], [[XQ3 Platform|Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' came under attack by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces. [[TIE pilot]]s, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] among them, repelled this attack, during which a group of Rebel officers attempted to escape their impending doom aboard [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Shakker]]''. Maarek Stele disabled the ''Shakker'', permitting Transport ''Soryi'' to capture the escaping Rebel officers and provide additional intelligence to the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
